title: Asia-Pacific markets trade higher as investors assess U.S.-Iran peace deal diplomacy
summary_full: While oil prices fell in U.S. trading, reports that Tehran intends to keep its enriched uranium stockpile within the country stand to complicate negotiations with the U.S.
